title: Senior Mechanical Engineer
description:
Our client is a leading solution provider for the construction industry that provides design and build services with an in-house multidisciplinary consultancy. Specialising in building, civil engineering, and infrastructure projects, they deliver innovative and efficient solutions to meet the evolving needs of the industry. Currently hiring for a Senior Mechanical Engineer, they will like to invite interested canddiates to submit your detailed resume to talent@asiasearch.com.sg


Senior Mechanical Engineer


Purpose and Scope

Manages the overall preparation of mechanical engineering designs, drawings, specifications, schedules, quantity and cost estimates for assigned projects.


Key Roles & Responsibilities

  • Main Mechanical Lead for the checking and design of mechanical works from concept to detailed design for projects
  • Conversant in local code and authority requirements, ensuring project compliance to the requirements.
  • Able to perform analysis and guide engineers to analyze and provide technical advice and solutions when working with stakeholders
  • Carry out project management, planning, financial management of project, contract administration, ensure key deadlines are met and team work together effectively
  • Liaise with multiple stakeholders for civil & structure, architectural, mechanical and electrical works
  • Preparation of tender documents and specifications
  • Design management, coordination with contractors, subcontractors and external consultants
  • Proactive communication, mentoring and guiding the reporting Engineers and Designers for learning and development
  • Ensure the smooth completion of the project within schedule and budget
  • Possibly assigned as Assistant Project Manager

Requirements

  • Degree in Mechanical Engineering, or equivalent
  • 5 years or more experience in the industry
  • Experience in both construction management and design
  • Conversant in Engineering analysis design software, BIM software, CFD simulations tools and other mechanical/fire engineering software.
  • On track to qualify as a Registered Professional Engineer with PEB Singapore/ Specialized Professional Engineer
  • Only Singaporean
